title: STOP Using These Youtube Title Formats!

transcript.text: The title format's still working, but the data shows you can put these to rest. Titles that end in a question are coming in at a 0.82 lift. That's roughly 18% fewer than the average video without one. The I was wrong confession titles are coming in at less than half the average lift. Playing how to with no twist is at 1.07, which is basically tied with average. And everything you need to know about X is wrong got flagged [music] as straight up burned out. So overused that the viewers see it and they're just like, "Oh, another one of these." You may have some of these titles sitting on your channel right now, and that's fine. They were the standard and they genuinely worked. So the standard just shifted under everybody's feet.
